'''gothataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabious|rabious]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabious|rabious]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gothataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gothatithi|gothatithi]] || [[word:gothatiji|gothatiji]] || [[word:gothatishi|gothatishi]] || [[word:gothatiki|gothatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gothatuthuthu|gothatuthuthu]] || [[word:gothatujuju|gothatujuju]] || [[word:gothatushushu|gothatushushu]] || [[word:gothatukuku|gothatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gothatuthu|gothatuthu]] || [[word:gothatuju|gothatuju]] || [[word:gothatushu|gothatushu]] || [[word:gothatuku|gothatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gothatufthuf|gothatufthuf]] || [[word:gothatufjuf|gothatufjuf]] || [[word:gothatufshuf|gothatufshuf]] || [[word:gothatufkuf|gothatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gothatethe|gothatethe]] || [[word:gothateje|gothateje]] || [[word:gothateshe|gothateshe]] || [[word:gothateke|gothateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gothatothotho|gothatothotho]] || [[word:gothatojojo|gothatojojo]] || [[word:gothatoshosho|gothatoshosho]] || [[word:gothatokoko|gothatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gothatotho|gothatotho]] || [[word:gothatojo|gothatojo]] || [[word:gothatosho|gothatosho]] || [[word:gothatoko|gothatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gothatofthof|gothatofthof]] || [[word:gothatofjof|gothatofjof]] || [[word:gothatofshof|gothatofshof]] || [[word:gothatofkof|gothatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gothatïfthïf|gothatïfthïf]] || [[word:gothatïfjïf|gothatïfjïf]] || [[word:gothatïfshïf|gothatïfshïf]] || [[word:gothatïfkïf|gothatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gothatïfthïfthïf|gothatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gothatïfjïfjïf|gothatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gothatïfshïfshïf|gothatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gothatïfkïfkïf|gothatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gothatïfthïf|gothatïfthïf]] || [[word:gothatïfjïf|gothatïfjïf]] || [[word:gothatïfshïf|gothatïfshïf]] || [[word:gothatïfkïf|gothatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gothatïfthïf|gothatïfthïf]] || [[word:gothatïfjïf|gothatïfjïf]] || [[word:gothatïfshïf|gothatïfshïf]] || [[word:gothatïfkïf|gothatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gothatæthæ|gothatæthæ]] || [[word:gothatæjæ|gothatæjæ]] || [[word:gothatæshæ|gothatæshæ]] || [[word:gothatækæ|gothatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gothatathatha|gothatathatha]] || [[word:gothatajaja|gothatajaja]] || [[word:gothatashasha|gothatashasha]] || [[word:gothatakaka|gothatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gothatatha|gothatatha]] || [[word:gothataja|gothataja]] || [[word:gothatasha|gothatasha]] || [[word:gothataka|gothataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gothatafthaf|gothatafthaf]] || [[word:gothatafjaf|gothatafjaf]] || [[word:gothatafshaf|gothatafshaf]] || [[word:gothatafkaf|gothatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gothatasha|gothatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gothatshësha|gothatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothatrosha|gothatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothatmusha|gothatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothatyasha|gothatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogothatnkshësha|gogothatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogothatnkrosha|gogothatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogothatnkmusha|gogothatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogothatnkyasha|gogothatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gothathatasha|gothathatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gothathatshësha|gothathatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothathatrosha|gothathatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothathatmusha|gothathatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothathatyasha|gothathatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogothathatnkshësha|gogothathatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogothathatnkrosha|gogothathatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogothathatnkmusha|gogothathatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogothathatnkyasha|gogothathatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gethætasha|gethætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gethætshësha|gethætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gethætrosha|gethætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gethætmusha|gethætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gethætyasha|gethætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogethætnkshësha|gogethætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogethætnkrosha|gogethætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogethætnkmusha|gogethætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogethætnkyasha|gogethætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gothfatasha|gothfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gothfatshësha|gothfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothfatrosha|gothfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothfatmusha|gothfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothfatyasha|gothfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogothfatnkshësha|gogothfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogothfatnkrosha|gogothfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogothfatnkmusha|gogothfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogothfatnkyasha|gogothfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
